---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
description: "Documentation expectations and update rules"
---
# Documentation Guidelines

Follow the repository instructions in .github/copilot-instructions.md.

## When to Update Documentation
- New features or changes to user facing behavior.
- Changes to setup, configuration, or environment variables.
- Changes to APIs, routes, or data contracts.
- Changes to build, test, or deployment workflows.

## Documentation Quality
- Keep wording clear, concise, and user focused.
- Use consistent terminology across files.
- Avoid outdated examples and remove stale guidance.
- Prefer short sections with focused purpose.

## Required Updates
- Update README when onboarding or usage changes.
- Update any related docs when configuration or behavior changes.
- Note breaking changes in the most visible user documentation.
